labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 622210 ($8,334,925,927) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 622210 ($32,019,081,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1580 (margins.json[62]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)); revenue/employee $130,689 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 622210); class <5: 14 firms, avg revenue/firm $890,214 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $140,654 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 38 firms, avg revenue/firm $7,502,684 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,185,424 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 170 firms, avg revenue/firm $33,088,576 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $5,227,995 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 195 firms, avg revenue/firm $133,816,626 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $21,143,027 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 208
